name: Stellar Asset Contract (SAC) Interface
description: Common interface implemented by every Stellar Asset Contract (SAC). SACs are the standard Soroban wrappers for Stellar classic assets and implement the full SEP-41 token interface plus SAC-specific admin operations.

functions.name: transfer
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` tokens from `from` to `to`. Requires authorization from `from`.

params.name: amount
params.doc: Amount to transfer (scaled by token decimals).

functions.name: transfer_from
functions.doc: Transfer `amount` tokens from `from` to `to` using a pre-approved allowance. Requires authorization from `spender`.

params.name: spender
params.doc: Address that was granted the allowance.

params.name: from
params.doc: Source account whose allowance is consumed.

functions.name: approve
functions.doc: Approve `spender` to transfer up to `amount` tokens from the caller's balance. The approval expires at `expiration_ledger`.

params.name: expiration_ledger
params.doc: Ledger sequence number at which the allowance expires.

functions.name: allowance
functions.doc: Return the remaining allowance that `spender` may transfer from `from`.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account or contract address to query.

functions.name: decimals
functions.doc: Return the number of decimal places used by the token.

outputs.doc: Decimal precision (e.g. 7 for most Stellar assets).

functions.name: name
functions.doc: Return the human-readable name of the token.

functions.name: symbol
functions.doc: Return the ticker symbol of the token.

functions.name: total_supply
functions.doc: Return the total token supply currently in circulation.

functions.name: mint
functions.doc: Mint `amount` tokens to `to`. Requires admin authorization.

params.name: to
params.doc: Recipient of the newly minted tokens.

functions.name: burn
functions.doc: Burn `amount` tokens from `from`. Requires authorization from `from`.

functions.name: burn_from
functions.doc: Burn `amount` tokens from `from` using a pre-approved allowance. Requires authorization from `spender`.

functions.name: clawback
functions.doc: Clawback `amount` tokens from `from`. Only callable by the admin on assets with clawback enabled.

params.name: from
params.doc: Account from which tokens are clawed back.

functions.name: set_authorized
functions.doc: Set the authorization flag for `id`. Requires admin authorization.

params.name: id
params.doc: Account whose authorization flag is being set.

params.name: authorize
params.doc: True to authorize, false to deauthorize.

functions.name: authorized
functions.doc: Return whether `id` is authorized to hold and transfer the token.

functions.name: set_admin
functions.doc: Transfer admin rights to `new_admin`. Requires current admin authorization.

params.name: new_admin
params.doc: Address that will become the new admin.
